app.title: Rich Text Editor
app.autosaveUnavailable: No saved path is bound yet
app.saveFailed: Failed to save the card file
app.openFailed: Failed to open the card file
app.newDocumentReady: A new rich text card draft is ready
app.editorLoading: Loading the rich text base card editor…
app.editorError: Failed to mount the rich text base card editor
app.unsupportedFile: This file is not a composite card that contains exactly one rich text base card, so it cannot be edited here.
app.discardPromptMessage: The current document has unsaved changes. Continuing will discard them.
app.importUnavailable: This document is not bound to a saved file yet. Longer Markdown content will be written into a formal resource file after the first save.
app.resourceUnavailable: This resource is not in the formal work directory yet. Saving will finalize it.
app.launchOpenRecovered: Recovered the target card from launch context
app.infoDialogDescription: Shows the current composite card, rich text body, and runtime status.
